description: One Excalidraw files-map entry keyed by its native map key. Binary data and numeric metadata stay inside file_json as text.

id.description: The decoded key in the scene's files object.

order_key.description: A stable fractional key preserving the source object's deterministic order.

prefix_json.description: Exact whitespace, encoded map key, and colon immediately preceding file_json; commas are supplied by the renderer.

file_json.description: The complete exact Excalidraw binary-file JSON object encoded as text.
